The '''Roti-Ow system''' was a [[Binary star system/Legends|binary star]] [[Star system/Legends|system]] located within the [[Zoraster sector/Legends|Zoraster sector]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. The system contained the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Altor 14]], and the [[Star/Legends|stars]] [[Roti]] and [[Ow]].
